items.title: Aaron Judge reportedly has bone bruise on shoulder
items.summary: Well, that explains a lot about the stuff that needed explaining. Aaron Judge was sitting out tonight’s game against Cleveland for the first time all year, and manager Aaron Boone let us know why: a bone bruise. I share Boonie’s hope that this is a day to day concern, though it does raise more questions. […]

items.title: Yankees to shift top prospect Carlos Lagrange to Triple-A bullpen
items.summary: According to the YES Network’s Jack Curry, the Yankees are shifting flame-throwing pitching prospect Carlos Lagrange to the bullpen. The 23-year-old had made 11 starts for Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre this season, but will now begin to adjust to pitching in relief. It’s a clear signal from the Yankees, who will see if Lagrange can help improve […]
